visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: Variables
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor this Go code for better performance or idiomatic style.
visualizerParams.initialCode:
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	var name string = "CodeVarsity"
	age := 5
	isLearning := true

	fmt.Printf("Name: %s, Age: %d, Learning: %t\n", name, age, isLearning)
}

solution.code:
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	var name string = "CodeVarsity"
	age := 5
	isLearning := true

	fmt.Printf("Name: %s, Age: %d, Learning: %t\n", name, age, isLearning)
}
solution.explanation: Improved the code structure and readability.
